news.title: Graviton Research Capital LLP bought 1,437,520 shares of PG Electroplast at ₹505.3.

news.title:
PG Electroplast faces production crisis; LPG shortage halts 2 of 4 plants.
CNBC TV18 reports disruption caused by LPG lack affecting operations.
news.summary:
PG Electroplast faces production crisis; LPG shortage halts 2 of 4 plants.

news.title: PG Electroplast expects adjustments to revenue guidance, impacting financial forecasts.
news.summary: PG Electroplast expects adjustments to revenue guidance, impacting financial forecasts.

news.title:
PG Electroplast shares drop 7% due to LPG allocation cut amid US-Iran war.
Gas supply issues impact production; shares trade 6.6% lower at ₹568.9.
news.summary:
PG Electroplast shares drop 7% due to LPG allocation cut amid US-Iran war.
Gas supply issues impact production; shares trade 6.6% lower at ₹568.9.

news.title:
PG Electroplast faces gas shortage as suppliers report issues.
Agreement with suppliers effective March 9, 2026, impacted.
news.summary:
PG Electroplast faces gas shortage as suppliers report issues.
Agreement with suppliers effective March 9, 2026, impacted.

news.title:
Crisil reaffirmed PG Electroplast's long-term rating at Crisil A (Stable) and short-term rating at Crisil A1.
Subsidiaries PG Technoplast and Next Generation Manufacturers' ratings were also reaffirmed with increased loan facilities.
news.summary:
Crisil reaffirmed PG Electroplast's long-term rating at Crisil A (Stable) and short-term rating at Crisil A1.
Subsidiaries PG Technoplast and Next Generation Manufacturers' ratings were also reaffirmed with increased loan facilities.

news.title:
PG Electroplast Ltd to join Dolat Capital Corporate Conference 2026 on Feb 18.
Meeting will be physical at Grand Hyatt, Mumbai; no UPSI to be discussed.
news.summary:
PG Electroplast Ltd to join Dolat Capital Corporate Conference 2026 on Feb 18.
Meeting will be physical at Grand Hyatt, Mumbai; no UPSI to be discussed.

news.title:
PG Electroplast is optimistic about meeting full-year sales goals.
The company faces uncertainties in the air conditioning market.
news.summary:
PG Electroplast is optimistic about meeting full-year sales goals.
The company faces uncertainties in the air conditioning market.

news.title:
PG Electroplast plans INR 700-750 cr capex for Greater Noida, Supa, Rajasthan, and Sri City.
Historically, Q4 delivers highest performance, contributing majorly to annual PAT.
news.summary:
PG Electroplast plans INR 700-750 cr capex for Greater Noida, Supa, Rajasthan, and Sri City.
Historically, Q4 delivers highest performance, contributing majorly to annual PAT.

news.title:
PG Electroplast held an earnings call on Feb 3, 2026, discussing Q3 & 9-months FY25 results.
The audio recording is available on PGEL's website for reference.
news.summary:

news.title:
PG Electroplast's Q3 net profit rises to 620M INR from 395M YOY.
Q3 revenue increases to 14B INR from 9.68B YOY.
news.summary:
PG Electroplast's Q3 net profit rises to 620M INR from 395M YOY.
Q3 revenue increases to 14B INR from 9.68B YOY.

news.title:
PG Electroplast Ltd will participate in the JM Financial India Xchange Singapore 2026 conference on Feb 5.
The physical group meeting will be at The Fullerton Hotel, Singapore, with no UPSI discussed.
news.summary:

news.title:
PG Electroplast acquires 72-acre land in Kamargaon, Ahilyanagar for ₹1000 crore.
The project indicates major growth prospects in Maharashtra for the company.
news.summary:
PG Electroplast acquires 72-acre land in Kamargaon, Ahilyanagar for ₹1000 crore.
The project indicates major growth prospects in Maharashtra for the company.

news.title:
PG Electroplast shares drop for 11th day, losing 16% over last 11 sessions, now at ₹539.8.
Retail investors reduced stake from 18.8% to 16.5% in Q3, while MFs increased holding to 18.7%.
news.summary:
PG Electroplast shares drop for 11th day, losing 16% over last 11 sessions, now at ₹539.8.
Retail investors reduced stake from 18.8% to 16.5% in Q3, while MFs increased holding to 18.7%.

news.title:
Dixon Technologies faced Q2 challenges due to valuation fatigue, high memory prices, and PLI concerns, despite 56% YoY revenue growth in H1FY26.
PG Electroplast saw 45% Q2 AC revenue decline, impacted by monsoons and GST changes. FY26 guidance lowered amid inventory issues.
news.summary:
Dixon Technologies faced Q2 challenges due to valuation fatigue, high memory prices, and PLI concerns, despite 56% YoY revenue growth in H1FY26.
PG Electroplast saw 45% Q2 AC revenue decline, impacted by monsoons and GST changes. FY26 guidance lowered amid inventory issues.

news.title:
Mutual Funds increased stakes in PG Electroplast (up 4.2%), RBL Bank (up 3.8%), and Can Fin Homes (up 1.4%) in Q3FY26.
Other increases include Five Star Business Finance (up 2.2%) and L&T Finance (up 1.4%), signaling confidence in growth potential.
news.summary:
Mutual Funds increased stakes in PG Electroplast (up 4.2%), RBL Bank (up 3.8%), and Can Fin Homes (up 1.4%) in Q3FY26.
Other increases include Five Star Business Finance (up 2.2%) and L&T Finance (up 1.4%), signaling confidence in growth potential.

news.title:
Dixon Tech likely to see flat Q3 with 4% PAT growth; Kaynes Tech expected to report 48% PAT rise on 45% revenue growth.
Syrma SGS, Amber, and PG Electroplast forecast robust YoY PAT growth; Avalon Tech upgraded to REDUCE on valuation roll forward.
news.summary:
Dixon Tech likely to see flat Q3 with 4% PAT growth; Kaynes Tech expected to report 48% PAT rise on 45% revenue growth.
Syrma SGS, Amber, and PG Electroplast forecast robust YoY PAT growth; Avalon Tech upgraded to REDUCE on valuation roll forward.

news.title:
Dixon Tech drops 9%, marking its biggest fall since Jan; traded volume surged over 6.3L vs 20-day avg of 1.9L.
EMS stocks like Amber, PG Electroplast, follow Kaynes' sell-off; Amber down 2.5%, PG volatile post guidance cut.
news.summary:
Dixon Tech drops 9%, marking its biggest fall since Jan; traded volume surged over 6.3L vs 20-day avg of 1.9L.
EMS stocks like Amber, PG Electroplast, follow Kaynes' sell-off; Amber down 2.5%, PG volatile post guidance cut.

news.title:
PG Electroplast refutes claims by HDFC Securities about financial health, citing inaccuracies in their report.
Company asserts adherence to disclosure norms, emphasizes accuracy of audited financials, and warns of legal action for reputational protection.
news.summary:
PG Electroplast refutes claims by HDFC Securities about financial health, citing inaccuracies in their report.
Company asserts adherence to disclosure norms, emphasizes accuracy of audited financials, and warns of legal action for reputational protection.

news.title:
PG Electroplast Ltd received credit ratings from ICRA: Long-term ICRA A (Stable) for Rs. 40 crore.
Short-term non-fund-based limits of Rs. 63 crore rated ICRA A1 by ICRA.
news.summary:
PG Electroplast Ltd received credit ratings from ICRA: Long-term ICRA A (Stable) for Rs. 40 crore.
Short-term non-fund-based limits of Rs. 63 crore rated ICRA A1 by ICRA.
